name: Bachok Cove
description: A barefoot-luxury hideaway on Malaysia's eastern shore, where sunrise spills across the South China Sea and palm-shaded verandas open straight onto soft, golden sand.
tagline: Where the tide greets the shore
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before check-in.

rooms.description: Sea-view deluxe with king bed and private balcony.
Spacious suite with separate lounge, rain shower, and ocean-facing terrace.
Two-bedroom beachfront villa with plunge pool and private garden path to the sand.

name: Cherating Bay
description: A laid-back surf-town retreat threaded with casual elegance, where heritage longhouses meet a quiet bay and the neighboring turtle sanctuary keeps watch over the shore.
tagline: A bay that holds time still
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before check-in.

rooms.description: Garden-facing deluxe with timber accents, king bed, and outdoor rain shower.
Upper-floor suite with bay views, lounge nook, and a sunset-facing balcony.
Standalone villa steps from the surf break, with deck, daybed, and private path to the bay.

name: Pangkor Sands
description: A west-coast island sanctuary facing the Straits of Malacca, where sunsets paint the water gold and a sleepy fishing village murmurs just beyond the coconut grove.
cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before check-in.

rooms.description: Breezy deluxe with queen bed, rattan furnishings, and sunset-facing window.
Two-bedroom villa tucked among palms, with open-air lounge and direct sand access.
